template.name: Signal Monitor — Job Change Watcher
template.description: Recurring (daily/weekly) job-change monitor for a watch list of contacts (champions, customers, alumni, ICP personas). Champify or UserGems as primary; Claygent LinkedIn scan as fallback. Severity-tiered routing to Slack + CRM. Wakes up on its own schedule — no manual list refresh.
template.estimated_cost_per_row: 2-5 credits per watched contact per refresh cycle
template.expected_match_rate: Provider-dependent: Champify ~85% detection within 14 days; Claygent fallback ~60%

columns.name: last_checked_at
columns.notes: Skip rows checked in last N days

columns.name: job_change_detected
columns.notes: Returns: {changed: bool, new_company: str, new_title: str, change_date: date, days_since_change: int}

columns.name: job_change_claygent_fallback
columns.run_condition: due_for_check = TRUE AND job_change_detected IS NULL
columns.claygent_prompt:
Check {person_linkedin_url} for current company + title. Compare to known: company={current_known_company}, title={current_known_title}.

Return JSON: {"changed": bool, "new_company": ""|null, "new_title": ""|null, "change_date": "YYYY-MM"|null}.
columns.notes: Only fires if primary provider returned null

columns.name: icp_fit_of_new_company
columns.claygent_prompt:
Is {change_consolidated.new_company} in our ICP? ICP criteria: {{ICP_CRITERIA_TEXT}}.

Return JSON: {"icp_fit": "yes|no|partial", "reason": "string (1 sentence)"}.

columns.name: signal_severity
columns.formula_text: IF(change_consolidated.changed == FALSE, "NONE", IF(AND(watch_segment IN ["champion", "advocate"], icp_fit_of_new_company.icp_fit == "yes", change_consolidated.days_since_change <= 90), "HOT", IF(AND(icp_fit_of_new_company.icp_fit IN ["yes", "partial"], change_consolidated.days_since_change <= 180), "WARM", "COLD")))
columns.notes: HOT = champion at new ICP-fit co within 90 days

columns.name: alert_message
columns.formula_text:
CONCAT("🚨 *Job change — ", signal_severity, "*
", full_name, " moved from ", current_known_company, " → ", change_consolidated.new_company, "
New title: ", change_consolidated.new_title, "
Watch segment: ", watch_segment, "
ICP fit: ", icp_fit_of_new_company.icp_fit, "
Recommended play: ", play_recommended)

verification_checklist: Watch list count matches CRM segment count
First scheduled run completes within 30 min for ≤500 watched contacts
Spot-check: known recent job change in watch list surfaces correctly
HOT severity classification matches manual judgment on 5+ cases
Slack alert formats correctly (test with a synthetic HOT row first)
CRM update writes back to correct field (test on 1 record before going live)
due_for_check skips contacts checked in last {{REFRESH_INTERVAL_DAYS}} days
